CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-CRIMSON_SCEP: Whenever an enemy goes from [gold]Airborne[/gold] to not [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply {ImbalancePower} [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to it.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-WISHING_STAR: When obtained, choose 5 cards. At the start of your next combat, place those cards on top of your draw pile in the chosen order, then lose this relic.
Choose 5 cards to place on top of your draw pile next combat
The stars remember the future you once wished for.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-ANCIENT_EXPR: At the start of each combat, [gold]Deliver[/gold] a random [gold]Ancient[/gold] card.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-CALIBRATION_: The [gold]Imbalance[/gold] you apply is increased by {ImbalancePower}.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-PORTABLE_STA: Whenever you [gold]Deliver[/gold] a card, draw {Cards} card(s). Then go dormant for {Turns} turns.
You really would not want to know what might come through it...
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-EXPRESS_LABE: Choose up to 2 cards to gain Express
Stamped, sorted, and gone before anyone can ask questions.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-SECRET_CRIMS: Whenever an enemy loses [gold]Airborne[/gold], apply 15 [gold]Imbalance[/gold] to it. At the start of each turn, give all units 1 [gold]Temporary Flight[/gold].
Crimson, the authority over the skies, bearing hope and the starlit future beyond.
CRIMSONSCEPTER_ANGELINA_MOD-STAFF_COUNTE: Your Attacks cause targets to lose an additional {FlyPower} [gold]Flight[/gold].
An unconventional way to upgrade a staff.
